title: avengers-team trace
description: Trace record produced by meta-harness after each pipeline run. Filename format: {date}-{type}-{slug}.json where {date} = YYMMDD (6 digits, e.g. 260417 for 2026-04-17). {date} produced by session-init hook or shell `date +%y%m%d`.

id.description: Unique trace ID. Format: YYMMDD-{type}-{slug}. Same-day reruns: append `-HHMM` (e.g., `260417-prd-recipe-app-1430`). Examples: 260417-prd-ai-workflow, 260417-uat-ai-english-tutor, 260417-prd-recipe-app-1430

pipeline.description: Name of the pipeline that produced this trace.

generated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the trace was written.

plan_dir.description: Directory containing plan artifacts (`plans/{date}-{slug}/`). Populated for team-prototype/team-design/team-vibe. May be null/omitted for team-prd/team-uat (which use `prd/<slug>.md` and `uat/<slug>/` directly, no plan folder).

skills_invoked.description: List of skill names activated during this pipeline run.

evaluator_rounds.description: Per-round evaluator scores and verdicts from the Generator→Evaluator loop.

score.description: Single composite evaluator score (0-10). Use this for single-criterion evaluators. For multi-criterion (evaluator-profiles with weighted criteria), prefer `scores` + `weighted_average`.

scores.description: Per-criterion scores (criterion-name → 0-10). Used by evaluator-profiles with multiple weighted criteria (e.g. full-app.json, prd.json).

weighted_average.description: Weighted average across `scores` using evaluator-profile weights. Required when `scores` is present.

verdict.description: Evaluator verdict: pass (accepted, equivalent to SHIP), refine (retry with feedback), abandon (give up). Lowercase canonical; legacy uppercase SHIP/REFINE/ABANDON in skill docs maps to these.

feedback.description: Evaluator feedback used to guide the next generator round.

fixes.description: List of concrete fixes the evaluator demanded (used by REFINE rounds to drive the next generator iteration).

skill_triggered.description: Skill name invoked in this round (if any).

friction_summary.description: Aggregated friction data for skill evolution. Written by meta-harness after loop completes.

highest_retry_skill.description: Skill that required the most retries across all rounds. NULL when total_retries=0 (first-try SHIP).

total_retries.description: Total number of refine rounds across all skills.

per_skill_retries.description: Map of skill name → retry count.

lowest_avg_criterion.description: Per-criterion: the criterion with the lowest average score across rounds. Used to target evolve hypotheses at the weakest evaluator dimension. Only populated when `evaluator_rounds[].scores` (multi-criterion) is used.

outcome.description: Final pipeline outcome: pass (artifact accepted), refine (returned to caller for revision), abandon (pipeline stopped).

artifact_path.description: Path to the primary artifact produced (e.g., PRD file, design file).

notes.description: Free-text notes from the pipeline run (optional).

trace_hash.description: SHA-256 of concatenated `id + pipeline + generated + outcome` fields for tamper detection. Computed by trace-collector.cjs after all fields are finalized. Hex string, 64 chars.

evaluator_rounds.feedback: Persona section lacks measurable pain points. Metrics are vague.
Persona and metrics now concrete and testable.
